summary: Completed testing of Unified Sales Page with Quick/Order mode toggle. All 13 backend tests pass, all frontend UI tests pass. Features verified: mode toggle, checkout dialog with Cash/Partial/Credit tabs, manager PIN approval for credit sales, customer transactions history, and dashboard receivables.
passed_tests: BACKEND TESTS (13/13 passed):
- POST /auth/verify-manager-pin with valid PIN (1234) returns valid=true with manager_name
- POST /auth/verify-manager-pin with invalid PIN returns valid=false
- POST /auth/verify-manager-pin with empty PIN returns 400 error
- POST /unified-sale cash payment creates paid invoice with status='paid'
- POST /unified-sale without branch_id returns 400 'Branch ID required'
- POST /unified-sale without items returns 400 'No items in sale'
- POST /unified-sale partial payment creates invoice with status='partial' and balance
- POST /unified-sale credit payment creates invoice with status='open' and full balance
- GET /customers/{id}/transactions returns invoices, receivables, and summary
- GET /customers/{id}/transactions returns null customer for invalid ID
- GET /dashboard/stats includes total_receivables from both invoices and legacy receivables
- POST /unified-sale with mode='quick' saves mode correctly
- POST /unified-sale with mode='order' saves mode and customer_po correctly
FRONTEND TESTS:
- Unified Sales Page loads at /sales with data-testid='unified-sales-page'
- Mode toggle (Quick/Order) buttons present and functional
- Quick mode shows product grid with clickable product cards
- Order mode shows Excel-style line items table with columns: #, Product, Qty, Rate, Discount, Amount
- Customer search input works with dropdown selection
- Customer balance and scheme displayed when selected
- Cart shows added items with quantity controls (+/-) and total
- Checkout button enabled when cart has items
- Checkout dialog has Cash/Partial/Credit payment tabs
- Cash tab shows Amount Tendered field and calculates change
- Partial tab shows partial amount field and 'Balance (to AR)' display
- Credit tab disabled when no customer selected
- Credit tab shows full credit sale info when customer selected
- Credit/Partial sales trigger Manager Approval dialog
- Manager PIN dialog shows Shield icon and credit amount
- Invalid PIN (9999) shows 'Invalid PIN' toast
- Valid PIN (1234) approves sale and shows success toast
- Customer history dialog shows Total Invoiced, Total Paid, Balance Due, Open Invoices
- Customer history shows invoices with status badges (open, partial, paid, credit)
- Dashboard shows Outstanding Receivables with total amount
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_unified_sales.py - Created comprehensive backend tests for Unified Sales system
seed_data_creation: Created test invoices during testing (TEST_CashSale, TEST_QuickMode, TEST_OrderMode prefixed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Unified Sales system fully implemented and tested. Key features: 1) Mode toggle (Quick POS vs Order with line items), 2) Checkout with Cash/Partial/Credit payment types, 3) Manager PIN (1234) required for credit/partial sales, 4) Customer transactions history dialog. Test credentials: admin/admin123, manager_pin: 1234. Backend test file: /app/backend/tests/test_unified_sales.py.

feature_implementation_details.unified_sale_endpoint: POST /api/unified-sale creates invoice with payment_type: cash|partial|credit
feature_implementation_details.customer_transactions: GET /api/customers/{id}/transactions returns invoices + legacy receivables + summary
feature_implementation_details.dashboard_receivables: GET /api/dashboard/stats combines invoice balances + legacy receivables collection
feature_implementation_details.frontend_modes: Quick mode shows product grid, Order mode shows SmartProductSearch with line items
feature_implementation_details.checkout_flow: Cash = immediate paid, Partial = partial status + AR balance, Credit = open status + full AR
